thresholdWatch.title: Catalyst watch

executiveSummary.placeholder: Summarize the close in 3 to 5 sentences: what changed, the dominant risk driver, whether pressure strengthened or eased, and the single most important next-session implication.

marketCloseAnalysis.placeholder: Explain price and volume behavior, liquidity quality, unusual moves, and whether the close confirmed or contradicted the broader short-pressure signal.

shortLendingAnalysis.placeholder: Explain the combined evidence from short interest, SI / float, borrow fee, shortable shares, utilization, duration, margins, and days to cover. Identify the strongest driver and material uncertainty.

narrativeCatalystAnalysis.placeholder: Summarize dominant social narratives, sentiment direction, abnormal discussion volume, new filings, and material corporate events. Separate verified events from market speculation.

nextSessionOutlook.placeholder: State the next-session risk posture, the conditions that would strengthen or weaken it, and the most important pre-market checks. Avoid unsupported forecasts or price targets.

managementActionQueue.placeholder: Provide prioritized, role-specific actions for management, investor relations, legal/compliance, and capital markets. Every action must cite a report signal or known event.
